content.en:
The Ancient Sea of Turtles.

Ye Tian stood here, looking at the empty area around him.

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan even dispatched Ji Heng, and then they were afraid of attracting the attention of other races, so they sent the vassal race to find the treasure, and they must be sure that the treasure is still there. "

"But now, many fragments of the entire primeval turtle sea have been destroyed and shattered, and they still haven't been found. "

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan must not have found it, so where did the treasure go?"

Other Blood Transformation Realm creatures didn't believe in the existence of treasures, but Ye Tian believed in the existence of treasures.

It's just that neither the White Shadow Elephant Clan nor any other Blood Transformation Realm creature can find the hiding place of the treasure.

If the treasure really exists, I am afraid that it will take a special way to find it.

"Special way!"

Ye Tian pondered for a long time.

Soon, he continued to deduce one way after another, choosing the most likely of them from the countless possibilities.

Through continuous investigation, find the closest way to the truth.

Soon, he found it.

"Ancient Golden Turtle!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Whether it was the White Shadow Elephant Clan, or other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, they were not primeval golden turtles.

If that treasure can only be sensed by the primeval golden turtle, then only the primeval golden turtle can be found, and other blood transformation realm creatures can't find it.

"I've seen the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan before, and with my current cultivation, I can replicate an Ancient Golden Turtle of the Three Blood Transformation Realms!"

However, he did not copy the body of the primeval golden turtle now.

After all, there may be other Blood Transformation Realm creatures hidden around, such as the White Shadow Elephant Clan's sixth-time Blood Transformation Realm and seventh-time Blood Transformation Realm creatures, in case a Blood Transformation Realm creature of this level is secretly snooping, he dares to copy the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, and he will definitely be caught immediately.

Therefore, he needs to wait a little longer.

So, he left here.

......

Time flies, and after a long time, the news about the primeval turtle sea has gradually decreased, and there are few blood transformation realm creatures to talk about it.

Gradually, the primeval turtle sea became a thing of the past, and so did the primeval golden turtle clan.

The possible existence of the treasure was even more identified as a fake, and there was no mention of the Blood Transformation Realm Creature.

Seeing that the time was almost up, Ye Tian was ready to go to the Ancient Turtle Sea again.

The Ancient Sea of Turtles.

Ye Tian came here, and walked around, not even the replication talent was aware of the existence of other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, so he no longer hesitated, and began to copy the Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle three times.

Soon, a Triple Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle was copied by him.

"The real body copy the body and leave first, so as not to be exposed!"

Ye Tian left quickly, leaving only the primeval golden turtle replica body here.

Subsequently, this primeval golden turtle replica body carefully explored the primeval turtle sea.

He had time, and he slowly sensed every place in the place.

Time passed slowly, and a long time passed.

Finally, on this day, the ancient golden turtle's copy body sensed an extremely faint fluctuation.

"Isn't it right here?"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

His true copy body came here, but he didn't sense this fluctuation, only the primeval golden turtle copy body sensed it.

Obviously, only the primeval golden turtle clan can find this place.

Subsequently.

This primeval golden turtle copied its body and extended its power into this fluctuation little by little, and finally he sensed a special void.

Airplanes!

The primeval golden turtle copied its body and entered there.

"The real body copy body can't sense it, and it can't enter it!"

Ye Tian finally understood why the White Shadow Elephant Clan couldn't find it, such a secret method, if the White Shadow Elephant Clan could find it, it would be expensive!

I don't know how the primeval golden turtle clan created this kind of concealment, it's simply amazing.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian's true body copy body quickly left and disappeared.

......

Hidden in the void.

Ye Tian, the ancient golden turtle replica body, came here, and soon saw a special golden leaf hidden here.

The golden leaf seemed to be embedded in the void, and he tried to pull it, but it didn't move.

"This thing is the hidden treasure of the primeval golden turtle clan, even the white shadow elephant clan wants it, what is it?"

His immeasurable will probed into it, silently contemplating the mysteries above.

"Ancient Technique!"

At this moment, he finally knew what this leaf was, and it recorded an ancient technique.

"Ancient God and Demon Fist!"

This is the name of this primeval technique, and the recorded primeval technique is extremely mysterious, if you look at it for a while, if you don't look at it again, you won't be able to remember the content in your mind at all.

But with a brief look, he knew the horror of this primeval technique, and once he practiced it, his strength would be terrifyingly improved.

"This primeval golden turtle has too poor comprehension of replicating the body, you have to copy the real body to copy the body to comprehend!"

So, he began to copy the real body here.

In this way, the real body replicating the body is also equivalent to coming in.

Soon, the real body was copied and the body was copied.

Next, Ye Tian was here to comprehend this primeval technique.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai only almost understood this primeval technique, and if he left this leaf for too long, the memory of the primeval god and demon fist would gradually disappear.

Therefore, he must always be here to comprehend the primeval art of the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

Other than that.

If you want to cultivate the Ancient God and Demon Fist, you must prepare a resource - the Ancient Golden Blood, if you don't have the Ancient Golden Blood, if you want to practice the Ancient God and Demon Fist, it is almost a dream.

And even if there is primeval golden blood, cultivating the primeval god and demon fist is very demanding on the physical body, if you are not careful, the flesh and blood body of the blood transformation realm will collapse, and it will cost a lot of money to recover.

"The requirements are so high, I'm afraid that the blood transformation realm creatures who have practiced the primeval art are extremely rare, and the primeval golden turtle clan may not have practiced this primeval art. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, for him, the physical damage caused by cultivating the Ancient Technique was nothing, and he could completely reproduce his body, so it was not a problem.

His biggest problem now is that he doesn't have the Ancient Golden Blood.

"You can't collect the primeval golden blood directly in the White Elephant City, if I want the primeval golden blood, if the White Shadow Elephant clan knows, maybe guess that I have obtained this primeval technique, so as to force me to hand it over, then it will be troublesome!"

Ye Tian was going to copy the bodies of other Blood Transformation Realm creatures first, and then enter the White Elephant City to find out the news of the Ancient Golden Blood, even if it was discovered, he could just give up the duplicate body, and it was someone else who was pitted, not him.
